criteria.description: FR-001 verified via its owning WP's adversarial review (non-vacuity confirmed).
criteria.evidence: WP01 lane-a (approved). One-hop cross-function detection: `_COORD_AWARE_CALLSHAPE_RESOLVERS` widened to align with `_TOPOLOGY_ROUTED_READ_RESOLVERS` + `_resolve_setup_plan_feature_dir`; module-scoped caller index added to `callshape_violations`. `_VIOLATION_CROSS_FUNCTION` self-mutation test proven RED only via the one-hop machinery (does NOT flag without `module=`), GREEN on primary-fold counterpart. Reviewer traced non-vacuity. `pytest tests/architectural/test_gate_read_literal_ban.py` 30 passed. Command: `PWHEADLESS=1 pytest tests/architectural/ tests/integration/test_next_preview_primary_routing.py tests/integration/test_pre30_layout_coord_husk_noop.py`.
criteria.notes: Per-WP review did live edit-and-revert non-vacuity verification. Integrated full-suite run captured post-merge for the PR body (NFR-003). Mission-level negative invariants C-001 (no STATUS leg moved to PRIMARY), NFR-001/CT7 (zero new file:line anchors), NFR-004 (zero false positives) were each verified in the per-WP adversarial reviews (incl. an executed production-revert for C-001/SC-002) and are reconfirmed by the post-merge full tests/architectural/ run recorded in the PR body.
